script:
set +e
echo '=== last 6 inbound: ts | chat_id | text ==='
tail -6 /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/activities.jsonl 2>/dev/null | jq -r 'try (.body|fromjson) as $b | "\(.ts) | \($b.conversation.id // "-") | \(($b.text // "")[:80])" catch "parse-err"' 2>&1
echo '=== last 6 outbound: ts | chat_id | text ==='
tail -6 /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/outbound.jsonl 2>/dev/null | jq -r '"\(.ts) | \(.chat_id) | \((.text // "")[:80])"' 2>&1
echo '===END==='
